prompt: Create an ultra-wide fisheye fashion portrait of a young East Asian woman, unnamed model, standing in the center foreground of an ornate vintage hotel lobby. The camera is held high above her at a steep downward angle, extremely close, creating strong barrel distortion and a circular black vignette around the edges like a 180-degree fisheye lens. She looks directly into the camera with a calm, slightly pouty expression, one finger resting thoughtfully under her chin. She has long dark hair with two pink hair clips on one side, delicate makeup, slim oval amber-tinted sunglasses, hoop earrings, layered necklace, an off-shoulder white fitted top with a printed graphic, a patterned skirt, and sneakers partly visible below. The setting is a warm, dimly lit retro luxury lobby with red floral carpet covering most of the floor, cream sofas and a glass-top coffee table to the right, a small round table with a lace doily in the lower right, marble or stone walls, framed art, potted plants, a green reception counter in the back, an upper balcony/mezzanine on the left, wall sconces, and a glowing chandelier overhead. Use warm amber lighting, nostalgic 1990s boutique hotel atmosphere, realistic skin texture, glossy highlights, shallow but readable depth, high-detail editorial photography, dramatic fisheye perspective, no text, no watermark. Customize the woman’s hair as long black hair, eyewear as slim oval amber-tinted sunglasses, outfit as off-shoulder white top, patterned skirt, sneakers, and location mood as ornate vintage hotel lobby with warm amber lighting.
promptEn: Create an ultra-wide fisheye fashion portrait of a young East Asian woman, unnamed model, standing in the center foreground of an ornate vintage hotel lobby. The camera is held high above her at a steep downward angle, extremely close, creating strong barrel distortion and a circular black vignette around the edges like a 180-degree fisheye lens. She looks directly into the camera with a calm, slightly pouty expression, one finger resting thoughtfully under her chin. She has long dark hair with two pink hair clips on one side, delicate makeup, slim oval amber-tinted sunglasses, hoop earrings, layered necklace, an off-shoulder white fitted top with a printed graphic, a patterned skirt, and sneakers partly visible below. The setting is a warm, dimly lit retro luxury lobby with red floral carpet covering most of the floor, cream sofas and a glass-top coffee table to the right, a small round table with a lace doily in the lower right, marble or stone walls, framed art, potted plants, a green reception counter in the back, an upper balcony/mezzanine on the left, wall sconces, and a glowing chandelier overhead. Use warm amber lighting, nostalgic 1990s boutique hotel atmosphere, realistic skin texture, glossy highlights, shallow but readable depth, high-detail editorial photography, dramatic fisheye perspective, no text, no watermark. Customize the woman’s hair as long black hair, eyewear as slim oval amber-tinted sunglasses, outfit as off-shoulder white top, patterned skirt, sneakers, and location mood as ornate vintage hotel lobby with warm amber lighting.
promptZh: 创作一张超广角鱼眼镜头时尚人像，拍摄一位年轻东亚女性，unnamed model，站在装饰华丽的复古酒店大堂前景中央。相机从她上方极高处以陡峭的俯角近距离拍摄，产生强烈的桶形畸变，边缘带有类似 180 度鱼眼镜头的圆形黑色暗角。她直视镜头，表情平静且略带嘟嘴，一根手指若有所思地托在下巴下方。她留着长长的深色头发，一侧别着两个粉色发夹，妆容精致，戴着纤细的椭圆形琥珀色墨镜、圈形耳环和叠戴项链，身穿露肩白色修身上衣（带有印花图案）、花纹半身裙，下方隐约可见运动鞋。场景是一个温馨、光线昏暗的复古豪华大堂，地面铺着红色花卉地毯，右侧摆放着米色沙发和玻璃茶几，右下方有一张铺着蕾丝桌布的小圆桌，墙壁为大理石或石材，挂有艺术画，摆放着盆栽，后方是绿色接待台，左侧有上层阳台/夹层，墙上装有壁灯，头顶悬挂着发光的吊灯。采用温暖的琥珀色灯光，营造 20 世纪 90 年代怀旧精品酒店氛围，呈现逼真的皮肤质感、光泽高光、浅而清晰的景深，高细节时尚摄影风格，戏剧性的鱼眼视角，无文字，无水印。可自定义女性发型为 long black hair，眼镜为 slim oval amber-tinted sunglasses，服装为 off-shoulder white top, patterned skirt, sneakers，以及场景氛围为 ornate vintage hotel lobby with warm amber lighting。
